differential_diagnoses: Hypereosinophilic syndrome (HES) associated with occult neoplasm
Peripheral T-cell lymphoma, not otherwise specified (PTCL-NOS)
Severe atopic dermatitis with secondary infectious complications and cytokine dysregulation
next_steps: Excisional biopsy of an enlarged inguinal or axillary lymph node for histopathology, flow cytometry, and TCR rearrangement studies
Peripheral blood flow cytometry to evaluate for abnormal T-cell populations
Bronchoscopic biopsy or fine needle aspiration of the left lower lobe lung mass
Bone marrow biopsy and aspiration with cytogenetics to investigate unexplained eosinophilia and lymphocytosis
Measurement of serum soluble IL-2 receptor (sIL-2R) levels
T-cell receptor (TCR) gene rearrangement analysis on existing skin biopsy specimens
